channel.title: Posts on Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Blog

item.title: 2024 Reading List
item.description: # Book Title Author Notes 1 Thinking, Fast and Slow Daniel Kahneman 2 Sokak Kodcusu SSG 3 Database Design and Implementation Edward Sciore 4 Understanding Software Dynamics Brendan Gregg 5 Kubernetes: Up and Running Kelsey Hightower, Brendan Burns, Joe Beda 6 The Elements of Computing Systems Noam Nisan, Shimon Schocken 7 Programming Elixir Dave Thomas 8 The Kubernetes Book Nigel Poulton 9 Zero To Production in Rust Luca Palmieri 10 Systems Performance Brendan Gregg 11 Martin Eden Jack London 12 Istanbul Hatirasi Ahmet Umit notlar
